meta.project: Hanwha Ocean Smart Yard AX Dashboard

product_overview: A modular RPA + analytics + visualization system that collects dock progress and safety data, runs AI-driven analytics (D-Day prediction and resource optimization), and publishes a responsive Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard with CSV export capability.
core_goals: Automate collection and storage of dock progress and safety data (CSV-backed) via an API endpoint.
Automatically regenerate a responsive Tailwind dashboard when data changes so stakeholders see up-to-date KPIs.
Provide AI-driven analytics (D-Day prediction, resource optimization, safety alerts) to support proactive decisions.
Enable exportable, auditable CSV reports from the dashboard for downstream BI and governance.

features.name: Update Dock Status
features.description: Receive per-dock progress and safety payloads via API and persist them as the canonical CSV data source (dock_status.csv).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/update-dock with valid JSON payload (dock_id, progress, safety_issue, current_task, timestamp) -> Receive 200 OK with body {"status":"saved","file":"data/dock_status.csv","updated_record_count":N} -> GET /api/v1/dashboard-status?dock_id={dock_id} with no auth -> Receive 200 OK with JSON showing the newly updated dock record

POST /api/v1/update-dock with missing required fields (e.g., no progress) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error JSON -> GET /api/v1/dashboard-status?dock_id={dock_id} -> Receive 200 OK with previous (unchanged) dock record

features.name: Dashboard Generation
features.description: Automatically regenerate the Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard HTML when the dock CSV is updated so the UI reflects the latest data without manual rebuilds.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/update-dock with valid JSON payload -> Receive 200 OK confirming CSV update -> GET /dashboard (serves smart_yard_dashboard.html or Tailwind HTML) -> Receive 200 OK with HTML body containing updated metrics and a recent-generation timestamp

POST /api/v1/update-dock with valid JSON payload -> Receive 200 OK confirming CSV update -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error with generation failure page -> GET /api/v1/logs?source=dashboard-generate -> Receive 200 OK with JSON log entries describing the generation error

features.name: AX Analytics
features.description: Provide business intelligence endpoints that return D-Day (projected completion) predictions and AI-driven resource optimization/safety recommendations per dock or for the yard.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/analytics?dock_id={dock_id} -> Receive 200 OK with JSON {"dock_id":...,"d_day":"YYYY-MM-DD","daily_rate":X.X,"risk_level":"low/medium/high","recommendations":[...] } -> GET /api/v1/analytics/explain?dock_id={dock_id} -> Receive 200 OK with JSON explanation of model factors and rule-based decisions

GET /api/v1/analytics?dock_id=unknown-id -> Receive 404 Not Found with JSON {"error":"dock not found"} -> GET /api/v1/analytics?dock_id={dock_id}&refresh=false -> Receive 200 OK with previously cached analytics or guidance to retry

features.name: Report Export
features.description: Allow operators to export processed dock data (CSV) from the dashboard via a download action or programmatic API call for BI ingestion and archival.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/export-report?format=csv&since=YYYY-MM-DD -> Receive 200 OK with Content-Type: text/csv and CSV payload of processed dock records -> Client saves file as dock_status_export_YYYY-MM-DD.csv

GET /api/v1/export-report?format=xml -> Receive 400 Bad Request with JSON {"error":"unsupported format"} -> GET /api/v1/export-report?format=csv&since=YYYY-MM-DD -> Receive 204 No Content when no records match the requested range

features.name: Update Dock Status
features.description: Receives dock progress and safety data via POST /api/v1/update-dock and saves to CSV.

features.name: Dashboard Generation
features.description: Automatically re-generates the Tailwind-based smart yard dashboard HTML when data is updated.

features.description: Provides business intelligence such as D-Day prediction and AI-driven resource optimization insights.

features.description: Export processed dock data as a CSV report via a dashboard button.
